dependencies: Limited labor resources in Macau competing with multiple casino properties
Transportation infrastructure capacity to and from Macau
Energy supply for large-scale resort operations
Water resources particularly in Las Vegas and other operating regions
risks: Labor competition and wage inflation in Macau
Supply chain disruptions affecting procurement of goods
Transportation infrastructure inadequacy in Macau could negatively impact visitation
Energy price volatility and supply constraints
Water scarcity in Las Vegas and other operating regions
Difficulty hiring and retaining sufficient employees
Disruptions to global supply chain from macroeconomic conditions

regulatory_risks: Gaming license revocation or non-renewal in various jurisdictions
Macau government can terminate MGM Grand Paradise's concession without compensation under certain circumstances
Macau government can redeem concession with one year notice from eighth year onwards
Changes in gaming tax rates and regulatory requirements
Compliance with Bank Secrecy Act and anti-money laundering regulations
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) violations and enforcement
New Macau illegal gaming law criminalizing unlicensed currency exchange and unauthorized credit for gaming
Privacy law compliance including CCPA, GDPR, and state privacy laws across multiple jurisdictions
Environmental regulations including Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act, Resource Conservation Recovery Act
Climate change reporting requirements including potential SEC regulations
OECD Pillar Two framework establishing global minimum tax of 15%
Smoking ban regulations in casinos
iGaming and online sports betting regulatory changes and enforcement uncertainties
Restrictions on Union Pay withdrawals and ATM limits in Macau
Cross-border currency monitoring and capital controls
Macau government investment commitments of MOP 19.7 billion over concession term
Gaming concession annual premiums and variable fees based on tables and machines
New York commercial gaming license application process
Japan integrated resort licensing and regulatory framework
UAE General Commercial Gaming Regulatory Authority framework development
State and local gaming expansion referendums and legislation
Increased scrutiny on corporate social responsibility and ESG initiatives

sanction_risks: US-China trade tensions and potential tariffs impacting cross-border travel and imported goods
China's anti-corruption campaign affecting gaming customer behavior
Restrictions on currency movements and capital controls in China
Potential changes to Hong Kong dollar and Macau pataca peg to US dollar
Travel restrictions between mainland China and Macau
Geopolitical tensions affecting Far East baccarat customer volumes
Protectionist legislation in response to trade tensions
Political instability and military conflicts affecting international travel
Sanctions compliance requirements across multiple jurisdictions
